_readme: Operator-maintained final results. This is the no-API-key fallback for finished matches.
Scores MUST be copied verbatim from a cited human source (FIFA, Sofascore, etc.) and
NEVER generated, guessed, or inferred. Every entry must carry a sourceUrl.
Keys are local fixture ids (see public/worldcup-data.js): group ids are like 'GD-1'
(USA v Paraguay) and 'GB-1' (Canada v Bosnia & Herzegovina); knockouts are 'K01'..'K32'.
homeScore/awayScore are integers 0-50 for the fixture's home/away team in canonical order.
Ships EMPTY: until a human enters a cited score, the app behaves exactly as before.
Entries flow through the same isUsableStoredResult + data-quality gate as live data,
and any live/provider score takes precedence over a seed score for the same fixture.
